caption: A man with a dark complexion sits in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT" and "AN", a black baseball cap with a silver emblem, large headphones, and a gold watch and necklace. He is positioned in front of a white background featuring stars and the word "HUSTLE", while a screen behind him displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". A professional microphone is positioned directly in front of him. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "STUDIO PODCAST" and text that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a smiling expression and keeps his left hand near his chin. As the scene progresses, he shifts his gaze slightly and, in the final sequence, raises his right hand to point toward something off-screen.
